generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T ANTIMONIUM SULPH. AURATUM. Antimonic persulphide, Sb 2 S 5 . Golden sulphuret of antimony. antimony. Preparation , Trituration. Authorities. 1 , Mayerhofer, Hirschels, Z, f. Hom. Kl., 19, 27; proving with repeated doses, varying from one-sixteenth to ten grains; 2 , Bcker (Beitrage). MIND. ► Apprehensiveness, [1] . HEAD. ► Head confused, [1] . ► Confused head on account of the severe urging in the abdomen, [1] . ► Pressive headache , [1] . ► Forepart of the head affected, [1] . ► Forehead feels confused, [1] . ► Headache one sided, especially in the left temporal region, [1] . EARS. ► A reddish swelling behind the right ear (on the third day), which leaves behind a redness and scurfiness, [1] . NOSE. ► Increased mucous secretion from nose, [2] . [10.] ► Increased mucus from nose and throat , [1] . ► Violent coryza with loss of smell, [1] . ► Nasal catarrh, with impeded respiration, in the morning, [1] . ► Catarrh and fluent coryza with a confused head, impeded respiration, and impaired appetite, [1] . ►► Bleeding from nose on washing , [2] . MOUTH. ► Pressive, boring, tearing toothache, [1] . ► Tongue very thickly coated yellow, [1] . ► Pasty mouth and taste in the morning , [1] . ► Much saliva and water collected in the mouth, [1] . ► Taste pasty, [1] . [20.] ► Taste very flat, pasty, [1] . ► Taste pasty, with a slimy coated tongue, [1] . ► Taste was sweetish, bitter, and flat, [1] . THROAT. ► Mucus from the throat becomes offensive to smell, [1] . ► Increased mucous secretion in back of throat, [2] . ► Pressure and tensive feeling in the throat, especially at the larynx, [1] . ► Pressure in the throat as if a plug stuck in it, [1] . ► In the morning, scratching, rough feeling in the throat, [1] . ► Severe scraping pain in the throat, especially in the larynx, [1] . ► Burning and heat in the fauces, [1] . STOMACH. [30.] ► Appetite increased to decided hunger (four grains), [1] . ► Appetite lost, [1] . ► Weak stomach, disordered digestion, with nausea, [1] . ► Almost loathing of food, with no appetite, [1] . ► Fulness in the stomach, [1] . ► Pressure in the stomach, [1] . ► Pressure in the epigastric region, [1] . ► Pressure in pit of stomach, [1] . ABDOMEN. ► Pressure and fulness in the umbilical region, [1] . ► Abdomen tense, sensitive, especially about the navel, [1] . [40.] ► Burning, sticking sensation on the whole left side, especially of the left lumbar muscles, [1] . ► Abdomen tense, full, [1] . ► Twisting in the intestines very sensitive, [1] . ► Great sensitiveness in the colon, and especially at the anus, [1] . ► Tensive drawing pain in the groins, [1] . STOOL AND ANUS. ► Constant urging to stool, [1] . ► Passage of much flatus, with sudden urging to stool, followed by a stool at first solid, then bright yellow, pasty, then violent colic and rumbling around the navel, [1] . ► Stool half solid, half soft, [1] . ► Stool of hard fæces passed with unusual difficulty, [1] . ► Constipation, with tenesmus and burning pains in the anus, [1] . URINARY ORGANS. [50.] ► In the urethra a tickling and twitching sensation, with increased urine, [1] . ► Increased evacuation of urine, with much tensive and tickling sensation in the penis, [1] . ► Urine increased, reddish-brown, [1] . ► Urine increased, reddish-brown (one-half grain), [1] . ► Urine increased, dark-red (contained traces of Antimony after six grains), [1] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► The scrotum itches more severely toward morning, followed by some redness; the next day a dry pustulous eruption develops, with constipation (four grains), [1] . ► The itching and eruption on the scrotum extended more toward the perineum (second day), [1] . ► Sexual desire unusually excited, [1] . ► Extraordinary sensitiveness of the genitals, [1] . RESPIRATORY APPARATUS. ► Tickling as from mucus in the larynx and air-passages, [1] . [60.] ► Tickling as from mucus in the larynx, without ability to expectorate mucus, [1] . ► Increased secretion of tough mucus, during the restless night, [1] . ► Increased mucous secretion, with fulness in the bronchi , and full, hard breathing, [1] . ► Accumulation of tough mucus in the bronchi and larynx, [1] . ► Fulness in the bronchi, [1] . ► Bronchi feel full, with difficult respiration, [1] . ► Pressure and constriction in the bronchial tubes, [1] . ► Increased mucous expectoration, mixed with blood, of a sweetish taste, [1] . ► Respiration embarrassed, [1] . ► *Respiration difficult , [1] . [70.] ► Respiration difficult, full, [1] . CHEST. ► Heaviness in the præcordium and apprehensiveness, [1] . HEART AND PULSE. ► Pulse in the morning 60, evening 70 (two grains the evening previous), [1] . ► Pulse soft, [1] . ► Pulse small, suppressed, [1] . NECK AND BACK. ► Tensive, pressing feeling in the cervical vertebræ, neck, and ribs, [1] . EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Tensive feeling in the muscles of the shoulder and thigh, [1] . ► Stiff, tensive pains in the joints, mornings, [1] . ► Constant drawing, tearing pains in the joints, [1] . ► Rheumatic pains in the joints, [1] . SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. [80.] ► Arms heavy in the morning, [1] . ► Painful immobility of the left arm, [1] . ► Rheumatic pains in the joints of the arms, [1] . ► Boring tearing in the joints of the arm and hand, [1] . ► Pressive, tensive pain in the left shoulder-joint, [1] . ► Twitchings, like electric shocks, through both ulnar nerves, especially in the elbow-joint, [2] . ► Pressure and heaviness in the bones of the forearm, [1] . ► Swelling of the fingers, [1] . ► Tensive swollen feeling of the fingers, [1] . SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Deep sleep with sweat (four grains), [1] . [90.] ► Sleep soporous, not refreshing, [1] . ► Extremely broken soporous sleep, [1] . ► Sleep quiet till midnight, then sudden waking, with confused head and pressure above the forehead toward the vertex, [1] . ► Sudden waking after midnight, with great excitement and restlessness; unusually excited sexual desire; after this the sleep was light, [1] . ► Slept only three hours, suddenly awoke with a heavy, confused head, pressure in the stomach, difficult breathing, fulness of the bronchi, restless tossing about, skin very active with slight warmth, and even sweat over the whole body, [1] . ► Sleep dreamy, [1] . ► Sleep dreamy, wakes after midnight with dull headache (six grains), [1] . ► Sleep dreamy, with sudden wakings after midnight, with very much increased gouty and rheumatic troubles of upper and lower extremities, [1] . ► Sleep very dreamy, frequent waking with a much-confused head, peculiar sensitive tension and dulness in the cerebrum (ten grains), [1] . ► Heaviness and weariness of the lower extremities, [1] . [100.] ► Tensive rheumatic troubles in the hip-joint and inguinal region, [1] . ► Slight swelling of the ankles, and especially of the knee, [1] . GENERALITIES. ► In the morning, sense of great weakness and prostration, [1] . SKIN. ► Pustules, elevated, dry, on the inner surface of the thighs, which itch, feel tense, pain on walking, and involve the whole leg in sympathy; they remain three weeks, when they dry and desquamate, [1] . ► Itching of the skin, especially of the scrotum and inner surfaces of the thighs, [1] . SLEEP. ► Vivid dreams and sudden waking after midnight, with great restlessness, drawing, tensive, rheumatic pains over the whole thorax and spine; difficult and noisy respiration, with profuse secretion of mucus, [1] . ► Sleep with anxious dreams, [1] . FEVER. ► General chilliness, with shivering down over the whole spine, [1] . ► Heat and cold alternate, [1] . [110.] ► Chills alternate with heat, toward evening, [1] . ► Moderate sweat at night, [2] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), Nasal catarrh, etc.; pasty mouth , etc.; scratching, rough feeling in throat; pains in joints; arms heavy; great weakness, etc. ► ( Toward evening ), Chills, alternating with heat. ► ( Night ), Moderate sweat. ► ( Midnight ), Sudden waking, etc. ► ( After midnight ), Sudden waking, etc. ► ( Toward morning ), Scrotum itches. ► ( Washing ), Bleeding from nose .
